output:
Completed T12 in `reigh-app`: `useAutoSaveSettings` now routes entity transitions through reducer actions instead of the old render-time preview path, with `useLayoutEffect` dispatching `ENTITY_CHANGED`, loaders continuing to use `LOAD_STARTED` and `LOAD_RESOLVED`, and local edits staying on `SETTINGS_UPDATED`. I updated the helper/test coverage around the new entity-transition resolver, adjusted the persistence comment that referred to the old behavior, and wrote the batch checkpoint to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/clean-up-medialightbox-edit-20260414-1623/execution_batch_9.json`.

Verification passed for `npx tsc --noEmit`, scoped eslint, and scoped vitest (`src/shared/settings/hooks` + `src/shared/hooks/settings`, 4/4 files and 42/42 tests). The required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already tracked outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4508 passed tests.

task_updates.executor_notes: Consolidated `useAutoSaveSettings` entity-change coordination around the reducer that owns `(entityId, status, settings)`. Removed the render-time preview path, dispatched `ENTITY_CHANGED` from `useLayoutEffect`, kept loaders on `LOAD_STARTED`/`LOAD_RESOLVED`, and retained local edit updates on `SETTINGS_UPDATED`. Renamed the pure helper to `resolveEntityChange`, updated hook coverage for React Query and custom entity switches, and adjusted the persistence comment that referenced the old render-preview behavior. Validation passed with `npx tsc --noEmit`, scoped eslint, and scoped vitest (`src/shared/settings/hooks` + `src/shared/hooks/settings`) at 4/4 files and 42/42 tests. Full `npm test` still reports the same unrelated repo-wide failures already tracked outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4508 passed tests.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `useAutoSaveSettings` now drives entity changes through reducer actions only: `useLayoutEffect` dispatches `ENTITY_CHANGED`, loaders continue through `LOAD_STARTED` and `LOAD_RESOLVED`, and local edits remain on `SETTINGS_UPDATED`. The old render-time preview path is gone, `useEditSettingsPersistence` no longer assumes render-preview semantics, and the loader-side `hasPendingFor` interface is preserved unchanged.
